diffs.before:
name: Deploy to GitHub Pages

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, requirement-to-prototype-demo]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  pages: write
  id-token: write

concurrency:
  group: pages
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm
          cache-dependency-path: pm-ai-app/package-lock.json

      - name: Install dependencies
        working-directory: pm-ai-app
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build
        working-directory: pm-ai-app
        run: npm run build

      - uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
        with:
          path: pm-ai-app/dist

  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
    steps:
      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4
diffs.after:
name: Deploy to GitHub Pages

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, requirement-to-prototype-demo]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  pages: write
  id-token: write

concurrency:
  group: pages
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20

      - name: Install dependencies
        working-directory: pm-ai-app
        run: npm install

      - name: Build
        working-directory: pm-ai-app
        run: npm run build

      - uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
        with:
          path: pm-ai-app/dist

  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
    steps:
      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4

parts.text: 用户说"启动项目"，根据 CLAUDE.md 中的指令，这应该触发 dev-start skill。让我加载这个 skill。

state.output:
<skill_content name="dev-start">
# Skill: dev-start

# Dev Start

启动 `pm-ai-app` 开发服务器，确保同一时间只有一个实例在运行。

## 步骤

1. Kill 旧进程：
   ```bash
   for port in 5173 5174 5175 5176 5177 5178 5179 5180; do
     pid=$(lsof -ti :$port) && kill -9 $pid 2>/dev/null || true
   done
   pkill -f vite 2>/dev/null || true
   ```

2. 等待 1 秒，再后台启动：
   ```bash
   cd /Users/dawinyuan/Documents/coder/agentic_coding_platform/pm-ai-app && npm run dev
   ```
   使用 `run_in_background: true` 启动，等 3 秒后读取输出确认地址。

3. 告知用户服务地址（通常是 http://localhost:5173/）。

Base directory for this skill: file:///Users/dawinyuan/.claude/skills/dev-start
Relative paths in this skill (e.g., scripts/, reference/) are relative to this base directory.
Note: file list is sampled.

<skill_files>

</skill_files>
</skill_content>

parts.text: 服务已稳定运行，现在可以访问：http://localhost:5173/ai-devops/

(index):9  GET http://dawin-ai.xyz/ai-devops/assets/index-DdrcNR3g.css 404 (Not Found)
(index):8  GET http://dawin-ai.xyz/ai-devops/assets/index-3ek7PsAZ.js net::ERR_ABORTED 404 (Not Found)
content.js:1 chrome
content.js:1 IS_SAFARI false  托管到 github pages 后访问报错

The user is saying that after deploying to GitHub Pages, the site at http://dawin-ai.xyz/ai-devops/ is returning 404 errors for the built assets. This is likely a base path issue - the Vite build needs to have the correct `base` configuration set to `/ai-devops/` so that asset paths are correctly resolved.

Let me check the Vite config.

parts.text: 发现问题了！构建出的 JS 文件是 `index-C7-C1ep8.js`，但你的 HTML 里引用的是 `index-3ek7PsAZ.js`。这说明部署到 GitHub Pages 的文件不是最新构建的。

state.title: Check built HTML references

parts.text:
最新构建的 JS 是 `index-C7-C1ep8.js`，CSS 是 `index-DdrcNR3g.css`。

你部署到 GitHub Pages 的文件是旧的构建产物。需要将最新的 `dist/` 内容重新部署：

```bash
cd /Users/dawinyuan/Documents/coder/agentic_coding_platform/pm-ai-app
# 如果用的是 gh-pages 分支部署：
npm run deploy
# 或者手动复制 dist 到 gh-pages 分支
```

需要我帮你执行部署吗？
